research_summary.city_summary: Toronto is the most populous city in Canada and the capital of Ontario. It is known for its cultural diversity, business, finance, arts, sports, and cosmopolitan atmosphere.
research_summary.seasonal_context: In August, Toronto experiences warm summer weather with average temperatures ranging from 20°C to 28°C. It's an ideal time for outdoor activities and exploring the city's parks and waterfront.
transport_notes: Toronto has an extensive public transit system including buses, streetcars, and the subway. Consider getting a Presto card for convenient travel.
Walking and biking are popular ways to explore the city, especially in areas like the Distillery District and along the waterfront.
budget_notes: With a budget of $2200 for 4 days, you have approximately $550 per day. This should comfortably cover accommodation, food, transportation, and some activities.
Toronto can be expensive, especially for dining and attractions, so plan accordingly.

places.name: Distillery District
places.general_description: A pedestrian zone filled with Victorian industrial architecture, now home to shops, restaurants, and galleries.
things_to_do: Enjoy a meal at one of the many restaurants

places.name: CN Tower
places.general_description: An iconic communications and observation tower standing at 553.3 meters tall.
things_to_do: Try the EdgeWalk for a thrilling experience
Enjoy a meal at the 360 Restaurant

places.name: Kensington Market
places.general_description: A vibrant pedestrian market with diverse shops, cafes, and street food.
things_to_do: Try street food from various vendors

places.name: Royal Ontario Museum
places.general_description: One of the largest and most-visited museums in North America, featuring diverse collections from world cultures and natural history.

places.name: High Park
places.general_description: A large urban park offering greenery, trails, and the High Park Zoo.

recommended_apps.reason: Provides real-time transit information for Toronto's public transportation system.

recommended_apps.reason: Helps you discover and book restaurants in Toronto.

recommended_apps.name: TripIt
recommended_apps.reason: Organizes your travel plans, including flights, hotels, and reservations.

warnings: Toronto can be busy during the summer months, especially in popular tourist areas. Plan accordingly to avoid crowds.
Be mindful of your belongings in crowded areas and use public transportation safely.

media_scenes.title: Royal Ontario Museum
media_scenes.prompt: A photorealistic image capturing the diverse collections and exhibits within the Royal Ontario Museum. The scene should be bathed in natural light, highlighting the intricate details of the artifacts and displays. The time of day should be early afternoon to ensure ample daylight, and the crowd level should be moderate to avoid any distractions.

media_scenes.title: Distillery District
media_scenes.prompt: A photorealistic image capturing the Victorian architecture and cobblestone streets of the Distillery District. The photo should be taken with a wide-angle lens to encompass the historic charm of the area. The weather should be clear and sunny, with the season being late spring or early summer to showcase the vibrant greenery. The crowd level should be moderate, with a few visitors exploring the area.

media_scenes.title: CN Tower
media_scenes.prompt: A photorealistic image capturing the panoramic views from the observation deck of the CN Tower. The photo should be taken using a tripod to ensure stability and sharpness, focusing on the expansive cityscape below. The time of day should be late afternoon to capture the golden hour, with the weather being clear and the crowd level being moderate.

media_scenes.title: High Park
media_scenes.prompt: A photorealistic image capturing the greenery and trails of High Park. The photo should be taken using a drone to provide an aerial view of the park's natural beauty. The season should be early autumn, with the weather being mild and clear. The crowd level should be low to highlight the serene environment.
style_rules: Use a drone for aerial shots
